title: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
full_text: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics. Most organizations run their AI on a familiar base of hyperscalers and model-provider APIs, yet the next dollar is aimed at specialized compute almost none of them use today; a majority intend to switch or add providers within the year, many within a quarter. Buying decisions turn on integration and total cost of ownership rather than headline token price — which is fortuna

Buying decisions turn on integration and total cost of ownership rather than headline token price — which is fortuna
